chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1491 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.5850/2025 (Ex/A) 3. For orders on CMA No.5851/2025 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 04.09.2025 ************** 1. Deferred for the time being. 2. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3&4. On 01.09.2025, counsel for the petitioner was directed to satisfy the Court about the maintainability of the present Constitution Petition. Today, none is present on behalf of the petitioner nor any intimation has been received. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing the matter. Accordingly, the present Constitution Petition stands dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
